title: Knowledge, attitudes, and concerns about psilocybin and MDMA as novel therapies among U.S. healthcare professionals
justification: The paper supports healthcare professionals in developing knowledge and understanding of psychedelic-assisted therapy, contributing to professional learning and evidence awareness regarding novel therapies.

title: Education and clinical decision support for healthcare professionals on emergency preparedness for extremely dangerous pathogens: report of a conference workshop
justification: The paper supports healthcare professionals in developing knowledge and understanding related to emergency preparedness for infectious diseases, contributing to professional learning and evidence awareness.

title: Instruments for assessing healthcare professionals' knowledge and skills of evidence-based practice: A scoping review.
justification: The paper focuses on assessing healthcare professionals' knowledge and skills related to evidence-based practice, contributing to professional learning and understanding of research evidence.

title: Bioethical knowledge in students and health professionals: a systematic review
justification: The paper focuses on the development of bioethical knowledge among healthcare professionals, contributing to their professional learning and understanding of ethical dilemmas in clinical practice. It supports the synthesis and interpretation of healthcare literature related to ethics, which aligns with the inclusion criteria.

title: The Medical Science Liaison Role in Spain: A Survey About the Opinion of HealthCare Professionals
justification: The paper focuses on healthcare professionals' understanding of the Medical Science Liaison role and its impact on their clinical practice, contributing to professional learning and evidence awareness.
